title: Jambalaya
excerpt: Ingredients 90 ml oil 8 chicken thighs 1 chorizo sausage sliced into rings 2 celery stalks sliced into rings 1 carrot sliced into rings 1 onion finely chopped 6 garlic cloves crushed 4 chillies sliced into rings 1 red pepper sliced into strips 1 yellow pepper sliced into strips 400 g rice 500 ml chicken stock 200 ml white wine 1 tin …
html:
Ingredients

  • 90 ml oil
  • 8 chicken thighs
  • 1 chorizo sausage sliced into rings
  • 2 celery stalks sliced into rings
  • 1 carrot sliced into rings
  • 1 onion finely chopped
  • 6 garlic cloves crushed
  • 4 chillies sliced into rings
  • 1 red pepper sliced into strips
  • 1 yellow pepper sliced into strips
  • 400 g rice
  • 500 ml chicken stock
  • 200 ml white wine
  • 1 tin Mexican tomato mix in a can
  • 5 ml dried oregano
  • 5 ml sugar
  • 100 ml fresh parsley finely chopped
  • 5 ml dried basil
  • salt and pepper

Method

Preheat oil in a large pot and fry the chicken and chorizo until golden brown. Remove from the pot.

Now fry the celery, carrot, onion, chillies, red and yellow peppers and garlic until soft.

Add the rice and fry lightly.

Stir in the herbs, sugar, chicken stock and wine.

Place the chicken and sausage on top.

Put the lid on and cook until the rice is soft. Be careful that nothing burns on the bottom!

Easy!
